feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Master Data Change Report - SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is there a Master Data Change Report in SuccessFactors that reports all personal and organizational data change of employees (e.g. FTE change, Job Title change etc.)?

The report would be sent to the external payroll provider to process the changes in their system.

Best regards,

Maté

entry.title: How to limit/hide content from an ADMIN permission role in SuccessFactors - Employee Central?
entry.content:
In my organisation we have a few Admin permission roles. E.g

1. Systems Admin Role - which is granted to the team who are admins of the SuccessFactors. they have full access to the employee central and other modules for all employees across the company. 

  2. HR Admin Role - which is granted to the team/s who are in the shared services teams who maintains employee life cycle data and have access to employee central module for all employees across the company. 

for these role we don't have a a target permission groups as the role is granted to everyone

 

As this is for all employees  the team who have access can view their peer's compensation and other sensitive data which is creating conflicts. Hence i am brainstorming of ways to restrict peer's profile from the permission role. 

 

I have already explored the option of creating a permission group the below parameters, but its not dynamic and its a lot more maintenance. Hence i want to understand if there is a better way to restrict peers data from an Admin Permission role

entry.title: Deletion of Salary Grades
entry.content:
Hi,

How can we Salary grades from compensation in a Non-EC integrated system as a Post refresh activity?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Deletion of salary grades
entry.content:
Hi,

How can we delete the salary grades from the compensation in the non-EC integrated system?
It needs to be done as a post-refresh activity.

 

Thanks

entry.title: How to make futur termination date visible before termination date ?
entry.content:
We are storing End Date for Fixed Term Contract employees in a custom date field.

we have a requirement to also store for unfixed term contract employee, the termination date when these one is being entered and make it visible 31 days before the effective date.

2 cases can happen:

case 1 : employee futur termination < = 31

between termination date data entry and termination date the custom date is filled with termination date

case 2 : employee futur termination > 31

between termination date data entry and termination date -32

no date is visible in custom date field

between termination date-31 and termination date

custom date is filled with termination date.

i’m not sure what trigger field i should use in a business rule.

i was thinking to use post save trigger and create a new event post the actual event date ( and prior the futur termination event) but these would requires to also handle the case when termination event is being removed ( these case would also need a post save rule to delete the event with termination date before itself)

am i going in the right direction or is there a simpler way to do so ?

i m thinking also to use offcycle event batch.

entry.title: Automatic creation of the job info and compensation portlet in Success Factors
entry.content:
Hello team.

we have the following requirement:

The job info and compensation portlet need to be updated automatically for unionized employees.

The compensation portlet must be updated with the next pay scale level.

 

These are the conditions:

The employee must have been working in the company for 3 months.

The employee must have completed the mandatory courses for newly hired employees, this information is in a custom portlet.

Unionized employees are identified by Employee Class and Employment type.

We need to create an integration that runs every Friday to update the job information and compensation portlet for eligible employees.

The company has around 25000 employees

 

Example:

The hire date of employee 9999 is 02-01-2024 (This information is in employment details)

 

This is the information in the job information portlet.

Start date:  02-01-2024.

 

Salary structure

Pay scale type.  01

Pay scale area.  01

Pay scale group. 01

Pay scale level.   01

 

This is the information in the compensation portlet.

Start date:  02-01-2024.

Payroll area: AA

Pay component    Amount   Currency    Frequency  

1000                         300             MXN        Daily

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

This is the salary structure defined for the company.

 

Pay scale type

Pay scale area

Pay scale group

Pay scale level

Amount

01

01

01

01

300

01

01

01

02

500

01

01

01

03

700

 

This is the information in the course portlet (custom portlet)

Strat date 02-01-2024

 

Course 1: Completed

Course 2: Completed

 

We are going to schedule a job; this job will be executed every Friday

 

The job is executed on Friday, May 3

On this date the employee has been in the company for 3 months. (first condition OK)

On this date, the employee has already completed the mandatory courses. (Second condition OK).

 If the employee has an incomplete course, the employee will not be eligible and on the next run (May 10), the job will need to check if the employee already has the courses completed.

 

In this example the employee is eligible

A new record must be created in the job information portlet as follows.

Start date:  06-03-2024.

 

Salary structure

Pay scale type.  01

Pay scale area.  01

Pay scale group. 01

Pay scale level.   01  02 (Next pay scale level)

 

 

 

 

 

 

A new record must be created in the compensation portlet as follows.

 

Start date:  06-03-2024.

Payroll area: AA

 

Pay component      Amount       Currency    Frequency  

1000                         300   500          MXN          Daily

 

The start date must be obtained from the pay calendar table.

The start date is the start date of the first week of the following month.

 

The job was executed in the month of May, so the following month is June.

 

This is the information in the pay calendar.

 

Start date          End Date

05.27.2024        06.02.2024

06.03.2024        06.09.2024 this is the first week of June and the start date is 06.03.2024

06.10.2024         06.16.2024

Can I resolve this requirement with CPI or Automate pay scale reclassification?

What do you recommend?

Thanks a lot for your help.

entry.title: How to convert a fixed term employee (Using Add new employee for Fixed Term Tool) to permanent?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm looking at a solution where we could use the "add new employee for fixed term" tool because we want to indicate the termination date immediately upon hiring.

I found this test script from SAP: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_EMPLOYEE_CENTRAL/6026f787205245a3846a7bbf4a3b12c2/2466e06fb5dd4e338a3bb88ce2226bcd.html

But it doesn't seem to work on employees hired via fixed term.

Here's my sample employee hired via fixed term tool: Termination record was already created and termination details are there.

What we want is to extend the contract, but when adding a job information change following SAP's use case 3 test script here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_EMPLOYEE_CENTRAL/6026f787205245a3846a7bbf4a3b12c2/f05eab84623040f39d54c9af194cbb64.html?locale=en-US

It gives me an error:

So my question is:

1. Is SAP's use case test script outdated? If yes, where can I refer for converting fixed term to permanent employees.

2. If conversion of fixed term employees (meaning hired via Add new employee for fixed term tool) is not possible, what are your suggested solutions to implement this kind of transaction?

Thanks!

SAP SuccessFactors HXM CoreSAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: How to do the accrual recalculation based on the work schedule change in employee time information?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have difference in number of hours accrual posting based on the work schedule of the employee. We have two work schedules called SLYD and SLYH. If the employee is assigned to SLYD work schedule then system should post 160 hours as the accrual per year on the starting of the year (1st Jan). If the employee is assigned to SLYH work scheduled then system should post 190 hours as the accrual per year on the starting of the year (1st Jan). This is working as expected on the starting of the year based on the work schedule assigned to the employee.

We also have a scenario that, we can expect the shuffling of the work schedules to the employees. 

Ex:- on 1st Jan if an employee is assigned to SLYD work schedule then there is chance of changing the work schedule to SLYH on 1st March. Now as per the configuration system is posting 160 hours on 1st Jan and the movement we add an effective dated record on 1st March and if we assign the work schedule as SLYH, then system is triggering the recalculation and updating the accruals as 190 hours and posting on 1st Jan. 

Our expectation is, system should do the proration calculation and post the accruals based on the effective date of the work schedule change. This proration should happen for accrual and also should happen during the termination of the employee.

Sample calculation for Accrual Proration

160/12 = 13.33 hours, 13.33 hours X 2 months = 26.66 hours ----> this is for first two months

190/12 = 15.83 hours, 15.83 hours X 10 months = 158.33 hours  ------> this is for ten months

Total = 26.66 + 158.33 = 184.99 hours.

Sample calculation for Termination Proration

If the Termination date of the employee is 31st March

160/12 = 13.33 hours, 13.33 hours X 2 months = 26.66 hours ----> this is for first two months

190/12 = 15.83 hours, 15.83 hours X 1 months= 15.83 hours  ------> this is for March month

Total = 26.66 + 15.83 = 42.49 hours.

But, in termination scenario system is only looking at the work schedule assigned to the employee on 1st Jan of the year which is SLYD and posting 13.33 hours X 3 months = 39.99 hours.

Please let me know how to achieve these requirements.

Regards,

Abdul

entry.title: System error when loading users in SAP SF: Exception caught:com.successfactors.sca.service.exception
entry.content:
Errors: System error when loading users:

00001700 - Exception caught: com.successfactors.sca.service.exception.ServiceCreateFailedException: can not get personId

User was has been hard purged and should be recreated

I am getting this error when I want to create a new user in SAP SF which was hard purged from SAP SF.

I've tried to Open Check Tool and search for "User Management" application: it should find the user IDs which are not properly configured and should be causing the error But there's no error related to user IDs

entry.title: EC Business rule for custom field picklist
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We would need to configure in Employee Central a business rule or an association in order to obtain the needed picklist values. We have a custom field in the Comp info portlet: "Pay Change Reason" which currently contains picklist values from all the countries, but the idea would be to have in that field only values based on the Country/Legal Entity of the employee. 

Any recommendation would be appreciated.

Thank you and best regards,

Eli

entry.title: Recruit Date Correction - Custom Field
entry.content: If we have created a custom field in Job Information (to store a particular date), can we configure the Recruit Date Correction tool to automatically update this custom field? If the answer is no, can we insert some sort of a warning/validation message to inform the HR administrator such that he/she knows that the custom field value needs to be manually updated when executing the Recruit Date Correction tool?

entry.title: Dependents' National ID validation
entry.content:
Has anyone come up with a way to determine if the national ID entered inside the dependent details matches any existing one in the system? i.e. to know which related employees are working in the same company and they declare each other in the system, so it must change a field flag to Yes. 

I understand that the standard validation is there but it seems to only work during hire/rehire. It is currently enabled but if i add a dependent at any point in time, it doesnt get flagged by the standard validation.

entry.title: Not yet received SAP digital certification badge mail
entry.content: Hi, i have cleared the SAP certification exam thr81 on 5th April 2024. However have not yet received my digital badge mail. What should i do? Please help me.

entry.title: When I enter the position in the system, it loads twice in Success Factors
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I'm facing a weird behavior in our system. When I select the position during "Job change" the system loads the position information the 1st time and in a 2nd time the system erase the position.

I've tried to check if there are any rules causing this. Association can cause this?

Have you ever experienced anything like this, or do you have any tips? I'm evaluating the existing rules.

Regards

#successfactors

entry.title: question, is there any medical management module integrated to SAP Employee central or SAP BTP?
entry.content:
Hello experts, we would like to know if there is a module where you can manage medical appointments, medication control, etc. at medical office level for an industry.
Not an independent medical center or hospital, but a small internal clinic within an industry.

Is there any solution that integrates to EMPLOYEE CENTRAL or any application already made in sap BTP or SAP independent module.

I would appreciate your comments

entry.title: Re: Not yet received SAP digital certification badge mail
entry.content:
Hey,

I have cleared the SAP certification exam thr81 on 9th April 2024. However have not yet received my digital badge mail. What should i do? Please help me.

entry.title: EC Job Info - custom field for Compensation portlet
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We would need to configure in Employee Central a business rule which can provide for our managers access to the Compensation portlet. For this case we would use a custom field from Job Info portlet (*Manager has salary access containing values like yes/no) which would need to trigger the access to the Compensation Information portlet. 

If you had any requirements for creating business rule which can support for the cross portlets access, I would appreciate your recommendations.  

Best regards,

Eli

entry.title: Pay statement visibility for former employees
entry.content:
Hello,

We are exploring on how we can safely enable the visibility for our former employees to view their last pay statements. Does anyone have a KBA they can share ? Also if anyone has the same requirements implemented on their SF system, can you share the best practice and any learning curve you experienced?

I appreciate it.

entry.title: Stay Current Assessments for SFSF Certifications
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Are there any changes regarding the mandatory stay current assessments for each certification in SFSF?

We used to take 2 stay current assessments / year corresponding to each SFSF release. Is a little bit confusing now the communication and seems that the validity of the certificate is now 12 months,  not until the next release certifications deadlines.

Do you know what exactly means now that the SAP Certification program is changing for SuccessFactors and what you need to get and stay certified?  (Message in learning hub)

SAP Certification Transformation Brochure

Thank you in advance!

Alexandra

entry.title: What is the recommended Application-Specific rule scenario to raise an error message in EC?
entry.content:
With the deprecation of the creation of Basic Rule scenario, what is the scenario we are to use when we need to generate an error or warning message in Employee Central? Perhaps we have overlooked it, but it seems that only Basic Scenario has "Raise Message" option under "Then" condition. 

Thanks!
